script:
#!/bin/bash
set +e
USERS="afrah aixa alejandro ashley axel cameron david emily jesusr jose lia neil neilc rosi stephanie zahid"
TS=$(date +%s)
echo '=== verify each user dir contents before reverting ==='
for u in $USERS; do
  d=/home/$u/.claude
  if [ -L "$d" ]; then echo "$u: already symlink, will skip"; continue; fi
  files=$(find "$d" -mindepth 1 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
  echo "$u: real dir with $files entries"
done
echo '=== revert: move per-user .claude aside + symlink + re-add to azureuser group ==='
for u in $USERS; do
  d=/home/$u/.claude
  bak="/home/$u/.claude.pre-revert.$TS"
  if [ -L "$d" ]; then continue; fi
  if [ -d "$d" ]; then
    mv "$d" "$bak"
    ln -s /home/azureuser/.claude "$d"
    chown -h "$u:$u" "$d"
    echo "  $u: moved to $bak; symlinked back to /home/azureuser/.claude"
  fi
  gpasswd -a "$u" azureuser 2>&1 | head -1
done
echo '=== restore master credential to 0640 azureuser:azureuser (group-readable) ==='
chmod 0640 /home/azureuser/.claude/.credentials.json
stat -c 'master: %a %U:%G' /home/azureuser/.claude/.credentials.json
echo '=== verify state per user ==='
for u in $USERS; do
  if [ -L /home/$u/.claude ]; then
    echo "  $u: SYMLINK -> $(readlink /home/$u/.claude)"
  else
    echo "  $u: $(stat -c '%a %U:%G' /home/$u/.claude)"
  fi
done
echo '=== verify groups now contain azureuser ==='
for u in $USERS; do groups "$u" 2>&1 | head -1; done
echo '=== test aixa can now read master via symlink ==='
runuser -u aixa -- head -c 60 /home/aixa/.claude/.credentials.json 2>&1
echo
echo '===END==='
